name: Doflamingo
description: Doflamingo is a 41 man and is 10 feet tall . Doflamingo was from a family of World Noble, Celestial Dragons, but had desired to destroying the world ruled by them because of his upbringing. This resulted him in being a broker in dark market selling weapons to instigate wars and and conflicts around the world and produces a special Devil fruit called “Smile” and the king of Dressrosa. He lives in a castle with with his crew of 13 people. He going by the names “Joker”,“Heavenly Demon” or “Young Master” by his crew and his nickname is “Doffy”. Plus he has string powers that allow him to manipulate objects and people around him and he is blind in his left eye
creator: Jas478ThatBitch
